title: CRM application (Notyfile)
description: Mobile CRM application developed at Notyfile using React Native, Expo, and TypeScript. Integrated with an existing backend API and built for real-world usage. Focused on secure data handling, performance, and maintainable architecture.

title: MiniChat
description: Fullstack real-time chat application built with React, TypeScript, Node.js/Express, and Supabase. Implemented authentication, WebSocket-based communication, and a live demo mode. Focused on seamless real-time updates and efficient client synchronization without page reloads.

title: InnoviaHub
description: Fullstack application for office booking and user management built with React and .NET 9. Implements role-based access control with admin and user accounts, enabling different permissions and workflows. Includes real-time updates for booking changes to ensure synchronized user experience. The project also explored AI-assisted features as part of experimental functionality. Designed to streamline workspace reservations with a scalable and maintainable architecture.

title: FrienDate
description: Application that helps friends coordinate schedules and discover activities based on weather conditions and shared availability. Focused on usability and smart activity suggestions.

title: SpaMedSpa
description: Booking application for spa treatments built with React, TypeScript, Vite, and Tailwind CSS. Developed with a focus on responsive design and smooth user experience.

title: FilmStudio
description: Fullstack movie rental application featuring a custom REST API, user authentication, and inventory management. Emphasized clean architecture and efficient data handling.
